templates.description: Minimal 3D scene with tikz-3dplot view angles and xyz axes — start here for any 3D illustration
Labelled 3D frame with sphere, projection lines, and angle arcs — useful for physics vectors, geometric spaces, reference frame illustrations, or mathematical coordinate system figures
Patch-based parametric surface — useful for function landscapes, manifold illustrations, terrain models, or any 3D curved surface
Multiple coordinate frames with Euler rotations and spherical-coordinate projections — useful for rigid-body mechanics, robotics transforms, signal geometry, or any scene requiring rotated sub-frames
3D polyhedron drawn with pure coordinate math (no external packages) — useful for crystallography, lattice structures, bounding-box diagrams, or any solid geometry figure
